scope.target: Publish remediation evidence, obtain independent post-audit, reconcile findings, and close lifecycle.
constraints: Do not rewrite the immutable baseline report.
Do not close without explicit status for every finding and commit evidence.

steps: Create and update the remediation evidence ledger.
Run aggregate quick and context gates.
Invoke ai-context-auditor read-only on this workflow branch for report 03.
Reconcile every finding and residual risk.
Complete task/workflow/backlog state, commit, and merge only after closure checks.
execution.last_completed_step: Published the remediation ledger, obtained independent auditor confirmation for all five findings, reconciled residual risks, and closed the lifecycle.
execution.next_action: Commit final closure artifacts; merge the clean workflow branch with --no-ff when requested.

results.summary: All five baseline findings are resolved and independently verified with no regression; the bounded post-audit decision is healthy-with-followups at 9.3/10.
results.residual_risk: Pre-existing coding-standard warnings, deferred dependency/version validation, hosted Linux coverage, and semantic parity remain separately owned follow-ups outside this five-finding scope.
